items.title: 2 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy Before They Soar to $4 Trillion in 2025, According to a Wall Street Analyst
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Wall Street analyst Dan Ives predicts that Apple and Microsoft will become the first $4 trillion companies by 2025, driven by their advancements in artificial intelligence. However, the author expresses skepticism about the valuations of these stocks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The author acknowledges the potential of Apple's AI features, but is skeptical about the company's long-term strategy and the current valuation of the stock.
The author recognizes Microsoft's strong presence in cloud computing and AI, but also notes the company's expensive valuation, suggesting investors should wait for a better entry point.
